Welcome to Module 3. In this module we're going to be talking about the specific Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Generation Process and Page. We're going to start by talking about the Six Figure Funnel Formula Unique Two-Step Marketing Process. Then we're going to talk about the Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer, the Lead Magnet Offer Page, the Lead Magnet Offer Formulas. Then we're going to get into a demonstration of how to create the Six Figure Funnel Formula Lead Magnet Offer Page using a couple of different tools.
